tweet.text: That feeling when you post your best episode yet! Link is in the bio https://t.co/WVMsVB7JwU
RT @BobPapa_NFL: Join @JustinPugh & me @SiriusXMNFL 10a-Noon EDT. Justin's reaction to Jets news, we'll talk @Patriots QB situation with @M…

Sad news! I got super sick in Atlanta and still dealing with the symptoms. We will not be able to make it to Seattle. I’m sorry 12th man, I know it would’ve been epic. 😔
We owe ya one! See you all in New Orleans next week. @NetWorthShow

I think its a trend.
It used to be get back out there as quick as possible but the best protocol for concussions is rest. Its a bruise to the brain... if you let it heal effectively you mitigate long term damage. So if you have the job security to rest longer aka high draft… https://t.co/aqF3JhiG2S https://t.co/DeeZeyguIB
Pissed I’m not in Seattle today for this @NFLonPrime match up. Going to be a great game. Electric atmosphere. I always loved playing in Seattle. Their DJ gets everyone hype, even the opposing team.

Any fear or thought of the crack toss with a big WR on your outside shoulder?
If I see that kind of penetration I’m saying screw the weak zone. Let’s crack the DE and get on the edge. https://t.co/39gSkHj0GI

Segment idea for you guys get Draymond doing One on Ones vs NFL players. Couple of fades in the back of the endzone or if he wants to get dirty come on down into the trenches and do OL vs DL! https://t.co/IYCPp8smUU

Just crushed a bag of candy and about to go for 150 and a TD.
Every OL is so jealous. https://t.co/p4gHurkrkR
San Fran’s RB should’ve scored no?
Wow I need to see a tailgate wedding before the season is over. Please let me know if anyone is planning on getting married this year! https://t.co/v2eha74qup

When Stefanski says “Yes Watson is the QB” he really means ownership has said no matter what Watson is starting.
Live look at the press conference. https://t.co/3Bxc3YIUcT
Love how the Giants are playing tonight. How about Tyrone Tracy?!?! Also 9 carries for DJ but just the threat is enough. Team defense! Go get this win now.

You gotta be kidding me. The 3rd down and the missed fumble recovery the next play.
I’m distraught.
There will be no Thursday Night video today. I didn’t make it to Seattle due to the worst flu of all time.

Ok @Saints fans it’s your time to shine. I’m in NOLA Thursday for the game. Sean Payton back to take on the Saints.
I need the best food in town….beignets, charred oysters and anything else I have to try!
You’ve always been one of the loudest stadiums I’ve ever played in. I… https://t.co/UxfdIHHyes

The real question is can you knock of Atlanta in the rankings?!?!
https://t.co/uENSvVzoge
Oysters at Drago’s it is! https://t.co/geWkndIcIo

What jersey should I wear for this game?
Hey @j_bushrod7475 you got an extra one laying around for your boy?! https://t.co/hm86pPs6wy
This is going to be a good one! https://t.co/T2FQHohW5D
@sterl_shep3 That better not be a gun gesture 😂
RT @BobPapa_NFL: Join @JustinPugh & me @SiriusXMNFL 10a-Noon EDT. Talking Devante, Amari trades. We'll be joined by @WerderEdNFL 11a #Rocki…
Devastating injury for the @Giants... AT is the rock for that OL. Get healthy and get right for next year! https://t.co/UOPwLhNDQ6

Just spoke with Ed, this is a wonderful cause...please go check it out.
Thank you to all of our military for your service! https://t.co/8Q013dF80J
This is spot on pro! https://t.co/KEsy70SPit

Hey @drewbrees I’m all in.
I am a little nervous with all of the moving parts. A lot of numbers and back and forth!
Everyone start practicing now…no literally, right now! https://t.co/GIyee6Nqhm

My professional opinion is that the @Giants don’t make any other changes to the line up other than new LT starter.
Start Josh Ezeudu at LT. Start getting Evan Neal reps there as well, he played LT in college and probably feels better playing LT vs RT anyways.
Dont mess with… https://t.co/PKxMlvYAKK
